zh.lifeSummary: 當Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina於1140年出生在義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉時，他的父親Marchese Obizzo Malaspina28歲，母親Maria Bianco25歲。他於1175年與Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina在義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1193年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Malaspina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Tino, Aldo, Antonio, Carmella, Guido, Mario.
from mala (feminine of malo) ‘bad, evil’ + spina ‘thorn’, applied as a nickname and personal name.

variants.name: La Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Mario, Rosario, Sebastiano, Carmelo, Gino, Giuseppe, Ignazio, Javier, Orazio, Salvatore.

from spina ‘thorn’ (from Latin spina), with the definite article la, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or in an area of scrubland, or (in a transferred sense) for someone who lived by the crest or ridge of a hill. It could also be a nickname for a tall, thin, spiky person.

variants.name: Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Ciro, Antonio, Carmine, Angelo, Rocco, Vito, Carlo, Carmela, Santo, Vincenza, Vincenzo.

from spina ‘thorn, thorn bush’, used as a nickname in various senses, including ‘distress, sorrow’ (alluding to Christ's crown of thorns), and also as a personal name; or alternatively a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word (in some instances with reference to the dedication of a shrine).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina was born in 1140, in Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italy, his father, Marchese Obizzo Malaspina, was 28 and his mother, Maria Bianco, was 25. He married Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina in 1175, in Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1193, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina est né en 1140, à Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italie, son père, Marchese Obizzo Malaspina, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maria Bianco, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina en 1175, à Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1193, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina 1140 in Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Marchese Obizzo Malaspina 28 und seine Mutter Maria Bianco 25. Er hat 1175 in Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italien Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1193 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina è nato il nel 1140 nel Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italia, il suo padre, Marchese Obizzo Malaspina, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maria Bianco, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina nel 1175, nel Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1193, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marchese Obizzo II Malaspinaが1140年にイタリアエミリア-ロマグナフエララフエララコレグジオで生まれた時，父Marchese Obizzo Malaspinaは28歳，母Maria Biancoは25歳であった。1175年にイタリアエミリア-ロマグナフエララフエララコレグジオでMarchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspinaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1193年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina(이)가 1140년 이탈리아 에미리아-로마그나 페라라 페라라 코레조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Marchese Obizzo Malaspina(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Bianco(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1175년 이탈리아 에미리아-로마그나 페라라 페라라 코레조에서 Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1193년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina nasceu em 1140, em Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Itália, seu pai, Marchese Obizzo Malaspina, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maria Bianco, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina em 1175, em Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1193, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina родился в 1140 г. в местности коррегио, фиррара, фиррара, эмеля-ромагна, Италия, его отцу по имени Marchese Obizzo Malaspina было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Bianco, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina в 1175 г. в местности коррегио, фиррара, фиррара, эмеля-ромагна, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1193 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marchese Obizzo II Malaspina nació en 1140, en Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italia, su papá, Marchese Obizzo Malaspina, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maria Bianco, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marchioness Richelda Frangipani of Malaspina en 1175, en Correggio, Ferrara, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
